meta.subject: Monthly Update — New from the Texas State Library
meta.intro: Hello everyone—here are highlights and resources recently published by the Texas State Library and Archives Commission.

articles.title: Talking Book Program Author Talk Series | Texas State Library
TX Texas Book Chat - Texas Center for the Book | Texas State Library
TSLAC Texas Public Library Speed Test | Texas State Library
articles.final_blurb:
Email invitations with the testing link were sent out via email to all public library directors on February 6. 

Please use the link from the email and conduct your test at the library location(s) by Friday, February 28. TSLAC is collecting internet speeds at main libraries and branch libraries. 

If you do not receive the invitation, please contact TSLAC Digital Opportunity Program Cooridnator Henry Stokes at hstokes@tsl.texas.gov, 512-463-6624.
